task_completion.description: Open TopoCal and initiate the import of the CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal application is open and a file import dialog is visible, attempting to open 'gis_export_yxz.csv' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Configure the column mapping for the imported points to match the YXZ format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import configuration dialog in TopoCal shows the columns being mapped as PointNumber, Y (Northing), X (Easting), Z (Elevation), and Description.

task_completion.description: Successfully import the survey points into the TopoCal project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Survey points are visible in the TopoCal drawing area, workspace, or point list.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the drawing as a DXF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog in TopoCal is open with the DXF file format selected.

task_completion.description: Save the exported DXF file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the destination path as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' and the filename as 'oriented_survey.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the TopoCal graphical user interface to perform the import and export operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with TopoCal menus, dialogs, and workspace rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows (Command Prompt, PowerShell) are shown executing scripts to generate or move the DXF file.

integrity.description: The DXF file was generated through the TopoCal export process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog in TopoCal is actively used to save the file, rather than renaming or copying an existing file in the file explorer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected DXF output path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\oriented_survey.dxf. Target X range: [480000, 510000]. Target Y range: [4300000, 4500000].
